title: Cuneiform Tablet #0411: Middle Babylonian Sale Contract
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Babylonian period — a sale contract document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Babylonian period — a sale contract document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Middle Babylonian period. Sale Contract document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records sale contract matters typical of Middle Babylonian period administrative or literary practice.
